overall.description: Game engine footage depicting a first-person traversal along a coastal bridge or causeway. The scene features passing a docked submarine, expansive turquoise water, distant snow-capped mountains, and a modern cityscape across the bay under clear blue skies.

events.description: passing the submarine, view opens to expansive water

agents.ego_description: driving forward along the bridge, passing a large black submarine docked on the left side

entered.detail: large dark submarine vessel docked at the pier with visible conning tower
black metal safety railing running along the left side of the bridge
silver metal safety railing running along the right side of the bridge
wooden and concrete pier structure where the submarine is moored
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a close view of a large black submarine docked on the left side of a coastal bridge. The camera moves steadily forward along the asphalt road, passing the vessel and opening up to expansive views of calm turquoise water and distant mountains under a clear blue sky.

events.description: camera pans right to view the approaching cityscape across the bay

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge over calm water, approaching a distant coastal city

entered.detail: distinctive tall brown high-rise building emerging on the horizon
cluster of modern buildings forming a coastal cityscape

changed.to: left_near and right_near with changing perspective

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the submarine dock, the camera travels along the elevated bridge over open turquoise water. The submarine disappears behind as the view opens ahead, and around the 16-second mark, the camera pans right to reveal a distant city skyline with a prominent tall brown building across the bay.

events.description: focus shifts to detailed view of cityscape across the water

agents.ego_description: driving along the bridge while observing the cityscape and snow-capped mountains across the bay

entered.detail: collection of mid-rise modern buildings along the distant coastline
mountain range with visible snow peaks in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the bridge with a sustained view of the coastal city across the water. The city buildings appear larger and more detailed as the distance closes, with snow-capped mountains providing a dramatic backdrop. The metal guardrails frame the view on both sides as the journey continues over the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge with panoramic mountain and water views

events.description: camera pans left away from city toward mountains and open water
submarine comes back into view in the distance on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the bridge, panning views from city to mountains and back toward the submarine dock area

entered.detail: the submarine visible again in the distance as the camera approaches the dock area

changed.to: left_near and right_near with reversed perspective

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera panning left away from the cityscape to focus on the mountainous coastline and open water. As the journey continues, the black submarine gradually reappears in the distance on the left, indicating the approach back toward the starting dock area. The snow-capped mountains remain visible in the background throughout.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal bridge that transitions from a close encounter with a docked vessel to a wide panoramic view of a distant city before circling back toward the starting point. It begins beside a large black submarine docked on the left, moving steadily forward along the asphalt road as the view opens up to expansive turquoise water and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. As the camera travels further along the elevated bridge, the submarine disappears behind and the perspective pans right to reveal a detailed city skyline with a prominent tall brown building across the bay. The scene then sustains this view of the coastal city and snow-capped mountains, framed by metal guardrails, before the camera pans left away from the urban center to focus on the mountainous coastline. Finally, the journey continues over the calm water as the black submarine gradually reappears in the distance on the left, signaling a return toward the dock area.
